claim_scope: 328 supplied source records and their 328 derived complements only; not corpus completeness

expected.qualification: mirror hash/size are an acquisition discriminator, not authentication of the authoritative bytes

assertion.acquisition_method: host-side curl with retries; frozen byte admission
assertion.content_type: text/plain; inferred from validated graph6 record format (header absent)

provenance.qualification: schema validation checks the recorded assertion, not the truth of external transport metadata

third_parser.method: NetworkX from_graph6_bytes; order, edge count, ordered degrees, and full upper-triangle bitstring
